text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: I don't geeeet iiiit!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's been like this for a while now, staring at her assignment and groaning.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Trainer‚Ä¶! 
Um, it's an assignment for race strategy!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: It covers the day I was absent with a cold, so I'm having a bit of trouble‚Ä¶ Ah, no, but! I'll figure it out somehow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: When she shows me the contents, it looks like an assignment to develop a logical strategy for a race under specified conditions.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: „ÄéWeather conditions: Heavy rain from three to two days prior, clear on the day of the race. Refer to the attached sheet for rainfall, turf type, and normal moisture content‚Äî„Äè

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: With this, I have to think of a strategy for each racetrack and date‚Ä¶ Let's see, attached sheet, attached sheet‚Ä¶

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Umm. This one is Western turf, and this one is wild turf. Huh? Overseeding is the mixed one, right‚Ä¶?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
And this place has a high moisture content, which means‚Ä¶ 
Mmmm! There really are a lot of factors to consider!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer, does this mean‚Äî

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Ah, no, no, no! Never mind, I'm fine! 
It defeats the purpose if I just ask you for the answer‚Ä¶!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It is certainly a bit difficult, but Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi should be able to figure it out. She has enough experience under her belt.
choice_data_list: <size=32>Calm down and think back on your experiences so far</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: (Experiences‚Ä¶ Does that mean I've been taught this somewhere before?)

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
(Rain, turf, drainage. When did we talk about that stuff? 
Mmmm, rememberÔΩûÔΩû!)

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
InhaleÔΩû ExhaleÔΩû‚Ä¶ Calm down, TsuyoshiÔΩû! 
InhaleÔΩû‚Ä¶ Okay!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: WhoaÔΩû! Culvert drainage! So there are artificial drainage systems underground at the racetracksÔΩû
choice_data_list: <size=30>Right. There's a lot more of them now, including at Tokyo</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: So the moisture content, was it? The amount of water in the turf. This course dries up much better than those numbers suggest.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Since everyone takes the shortest route on the inside and gets it all roughed up, people tend to think it'd be unrunnable if it absorbed heavy rain, but‚Äî

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: If it dries fast thanks to the culvert drainage, then sometimes there's a better chance of winning there than on the crowded outside where everyone assumes the inside is ruined‚Ä¶ right!
choice_data_list: <size=25>It might work perfectly if a lot of opponents avoid it out of prejudice</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
WhoaÔΩû! That might just end up being my secret strategy‚Ä¶ 
Ah, I need to write this down!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Hey Trainer! 
Can we use the VR Umalator right now!?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
My thoughts are coming together, 
but I won't know for sure until I actually run and check!
choice_data_list: <size=32>Got it. I'll submit an application to use it right away</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Just as I thought‚Ä¶! It's drier than I imagined‚Ä¶ 
I can break away from the very inside with this!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
All riiight, I need to keep testing things out at this pace! 
Let's do thiiiis!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
I'm dooooone‚Ä¶! 
It ate up a lot of time, but this should do the trick‚Ä¶!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Wait‚Ä¶ W-W-Whoa, it's almost curfew for the dorms‚Ä¶! 
I completely forgotÔΩû!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much, Trainer! 
I'm heading back! Thanks for todayÔΩû!
choice_data_list: <size=32>I already let the dorm head know, so calm down‚Äî</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Oww!?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
I slammed my face right into it‚Ä¶ 
H-How embarrassingÔΩû!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Even so, Trainer really is amazing! 
You knew I'd been taught that before with just one glance!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Panicking until you pointed it out means I still have a long way to go. Get it together! Get it together, TsuyoshiÔΩû!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Cough! Hack! ‚Ä¶Phew, that was close. 
That one didn't count. The put-together Tsuyoshi doesn't panic.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
All riiight! 
I'm going to become someone who can help tooÔΩû!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Not just someone who gets helped! 
This summer, I'll definitely become someone you can rely ooon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi's resolution, spoken aloud with determination, was absorbed into the indigo night sky.
